Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explores foundational concepts of justice and morality (Plato, Aristotle), which are precursors to modern discussions on equality and non-discrimination (Target 10.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly examines the philosophical foundations of justice and law through texts like Plato's 'Republic' and Aristotle's 'Nicomachean Ethics,' which underpins Target 16.3 (rule of law).
